reviews.review_description: This game is pretty good, especially when you unlock the rocket launcher and plow through every level. But the biggest issue with the game so far is the fact that the Level editor is not working. I can’t seem to build a level and then play it without it glitching out, but beyond that I think that it doesn’t really need a multiplayer, but it just needs an infinite mode.

please can you add mote levels and multilayer or even the ability to make levels easier or harder it would make it more fun for when you have finished the game and want a more challenging game it is great

This game is good but we need multiplayer and more lvls please and make more weapons and make more bosses I give this a 4 star I like it but those are the things that u need to add to the game also make the edit mode work please thank you

Really fun game played it for hours but the sandbox mode is broken and as soon as I spend 15+ minutes making my own level I play it and nothings there. Also thers only 10 levels or so all of them last about 5 minutes. But overall its a pretty fun game.
And make the maker work

reviews.review_title: One of the greatest games ever but…
reviews.review_description: I loved this I played for hours! One thing it could improve is having an online feature and a fighting other players feature. It would improve the game a lot

reviews.review_title: AMAZING fun game but there’s an issue
reviews.review_description: This game is very fun and Intriguing but I feel like you should add more levels.

This game could be really good if you balanced the game better (by nerfing guns, or making them only available after beating the game, and making enemies have more health),  added more bosses (pls add a king fight), and also fixed a lot of bugs. I really like the combat and I think this game has potential. (also there is way too much fog in the editor it makes it impossible to use)
This is a great game but it needs more levels.

The editor mode has so many glitches with the saving mechanism, it never loads, and it deletes your build even if you save it. Pls fix. 


The main adventure mode is really fun, but you should make guns harder to get. 


Overall a good game just needs big fixes and added mechanics.

It needs a multiplayer version, and if it gets one, this game would become huge.

This game is like a VR version of TABS.
I would give 5 stars if the create a level thing worked

I went into the mode where you can build anything building it and when I went to play it, it was just complete foggy white. I tried removing the fog, but it deleted everything I had. Please fix this bug in the game will be great.
Faster player speed, a graphics update, and a general bug fix would be beneficial for this game! It’s also a little too easy to get the weapons. Other than that I would definitely play again!
The devs are lazy
Can you maybe add multiple player to fight other people it would be fun in my opinion.
Title.. Hand position is so awkward aiming a bow hurts my wrist

This game is a good game if you are bored but every enemy is like a one shot. Could be better but is still great. One thing that would be great would be like wizards or mages. More levels wear you can beat bosses and gain magic stones. Still this is a very fun game I recommend.
Love it

reviews.review_title: Great game but the editor will not work
reviews.review_description: Its a great game with lots of potential if it had more levels but the editors elements will not work the white fog problem is fixable by decreasing it in the fog tab but if you place any elements it diapers pernataly once you load into your map
I love this game
Its pretty good needs more levels though
It feels like Im actually slaughtering indigenous fantasy soldiers! Can't wait for more 🌚
It is a great game but it only has 10ish levels more levels please

I found the "adventure" mode fun, and its cool to blast through hordes of enemies with guns as a one-man army, or fight with your brothers with crazy weaponry. Its pretty solid, but I have a couple things: One, the level editor is completely busted, pressing "play" will cause your game to have a seizure reliably, the fog is broken, and the editor is clunky. An overhaul of the editor or an editor tutorial would be great. Two, As much as I love the artstyle, i think some small graphical improvements would help. Over all, in it's early access stage, I rate the game a 7.5/10.
It would’ve better if it had more maps

I love the game, but a few more stages would be nice. Amazing gameplay and considering it’s free there is nothing to lose. Pretty sure this was my first vr game and I love it. Sincerely amazing and a must download. Thank you!

reviews.review_title: It's promising but needs a bit upgrades
reviews.review_description:
As mentioned by others, some upgrades are needed,

1- Grabbing your weapon must be smoother, I had a lot of difficulties grabbing my weapon, especially before the war

2- add a story and loot, upgrade your castle, defend and attack (could be a map based game)

3- add healing mechanism, make it old-fashioned like cuttery

4- Customise your army 

I can't wait for the full version with full potential 
I would definitely buy the game
Pls add more levels it super fun it’s like war

I absolutely love this game, and Ive spent 50+ hours just going through each level and enjoying the gameplay. This game is great for it's price tag and totally worth playing. My one critique is the level editor, which to my knowledge doesn't work as of 7/4. Apart from that, I hope the devs took satisfaction in making such a masterpiece.

The dang doors wouldn’t open 

at the level I’m on so I’m not trying to too be mean but the doors need too be fixed have a good day

You could use a slightly better map creating system and also new models for the nights because all of the humans are tiny stumpy people so it’s not as satisfying to get into combat with them. I would say just make realistic models. They don’t have to look realistic just have a realistic human shaped body to make the combat more satisfying and make the models more flexible. ￼
This game is amazing. It’s super fun just the problem is it’s too small of a game. There’s not enough levels and not enough items. I feel like the game ended before it even began.
nice but what do you need so many kills for guns

reviews.review_title: Needs improvement but has good potential
reviews.review_description:
It's a really good game with good levels but here are some things that should be improved/added in the full version

1. Obviously needs more levels and maybe even a story behind it

2. The editor completely doesn't work cuz I spent some time on a level and I clicked save them play but when I did my screen just glitched and lagged so I closed the game and it was gone..

3. Maybe even add a multiplayer mode or a endless mode or maybe even customizable characters

4. And lastly I think removing the guns and stuff would be smart to make the game feel more medieval


But overall a great game just needs some more modes and levels and stuff and some tweaking. But definitely has great potential.

For being free, this game is very fun, good combat and fun weapons, I believe some things could use changes/additions such as more controls for comfort, more clear instructions and maybe make a discord server for feedback and other stuff if you already haven’t.
Add multi player
Love it ivy been trying to find a fun free game and i found one RAGMANS the creator if your reading this keep going love this game.

reviews.review_description:

Everything about this game is great apart from the glitch’s here and there but this game is in early access, which means ‘expect bugs and glitches’ so it’s a great must play free game.
Ps: don’t use the editor mode, it’s really bad!

This game is incredible, it's very well made and has great potential. There's just a few adjustments that could be made like More levels, more items like Potions or traps. There's also a couple bugs like not being able to go up stairs or curbs, and maybe more types of enemies? Like Wizards, Giants, Or even Animals like dragons and even adding blood. Other than that the game is amazing an has great potential. Thank you to the developers and everyone who helped make this master piece.
The game has a lot of potential
Dont get me wrong its a great game it just hasnt been updated
We need wizards and maybe a dragon and a new level in a dungeon and a boat. But it's amazing

reviews.review_title: Great, but I wish it was longer
reviews.review_description: I loved the game, but I beat it in about 30 minutes. For being free, this game is great. Overall, I don't regret getting this game.

Game has potential the biggest things holding it back right now are no smooth turns and the placement of the hand's end game compared to the placement of the controllers in real life Leading to a really weird feeling when holding the weapon in the game either adjusting or allowing the player to adjust hand placement and angle Would make the game better
And do online levels
A good game but it could use some work

Kid freindly, not many games out there for -10. Amazing little game. My 5y/o grandson plays it with ease. Multiplayer would be awesome. Comfort is superior!! Will def buy when full version comes out. I cant seem to get the game editor working for some reason. That will fun when the bugs are gone. The AI characters are neat. They move so well. Can't say enough, great job!!!

This game is fun when you get farther into it.
This game needs a lot of improvements such as:
A sprint mechanic
Holster slots
More levels
Guns players can reload them selves
Limited arrows and ammunition for player (maybe put these in a hard mode)
And customizable difficulty options
So far it’s got most of the things to make this enjoyable. Personally my favorite level is the one where you get to invade the red castle.

reviews.review_title: Great game! But please add blood fx
reviews.review_description: Great game! But please add blood fx and it would’ve been a lot better! Add a storyline to it too and make the game longer

The game is very good, I beat all the levels, please add more, and the editor doesn't work, I took like 45 minutes making a map, I tapped save, I saw it on load it looks normal, but when I tapped play, the world became just fog and everything disappeared!! Fix it please
I just like how this game is and its play through and story make sense! Although multiplayer would be cool.
This game is amazing I loved it it’s fun to fight the people and kill the king it’s an amazing fighting game I recommend playing this

The Ragmans is such a fun game to play, it has multiple different weapons for you to choose from (however you do have to unlock some by getting a certain amount of kills.) However, the game is really short, I beat it in under 30 minutes! Also, some of the weapons are really overpowered, especially in the early levels. You can still get these weapons even if you don't have enough kills! Just click the randomize button until you get which weapon you want. Seriously, this game is fun and what I was looking for, but the game is too short. I would highly recommend this if this is your first time in VR.

Edit: So, i tried the edit mode; it sucks! No, the actual edit mode is fine, but the problem is that it is REALLY buggy! Whenever you try to play your creation, it will just bug out and force you to restart the game. Since i like to make things with the edit feature, this has made me upset, which made me change my review to 3 stars instead of 4 stars. Still a decent game to play.

This game is so fun that it's a five star game. Is what I would have said if editor worked. Please fix editor because I already finished the adventure mode. But I have been looking for a game like this for years and I found it. This game is honestly a hidden gem and deserves more people to play it. Anyways if you see this review please give this game a shot it's super fun.

I looked at this game originally and wasn’t expecting much, but it delivered! It is relatively short in length of course it being early access, but from the 20-30 minutes I played it was great, and I’ll definitely be coming back to try out all the weapons. An endless mode would go perfect with this style of game, but overall really enjoyed it!
TJIS is a very good game bro, the physics are peak and the siege the walls level is epic

I was pleasantly surprised by what this game already has to offer: it’s a fun, low-stakes combat simulator that can bring a surprising amount of depth and scale to the individual battles. The animation style is fun and fits the vibe of the game overall very well.

The largest problem in my opinion is the mechanic for holding weapons; whenever I attempt to pick up a weapon, it usually ends up at a much higher elevation and sharper angle than my controller is actually indicating. My assumption is that this is intentional, another way to match the unserious vibe, but I do feel that the game would be more enjoyable if the players were given more control over their hands in-game.

Other than that, no complaints! Keep it up devs, you’re doing great. 🤘
It was good but short
Extremely addictive game but needs more levels!!
Nah noob game
